---
title: An Energy Efficient and Runtime Reconfigurable Accelerator for Robotic Localization
author:
- Qiang Liu
- Yuhui Hao
- Weizhuang Liu
- Bo Yu
- Yiming Gan
- Jie Tang
- Shao-Shan Liu
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9994649
journ: TC
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
note: Supersedes MICRO 2021 Archytas paper
pub_number: 53
---
